SEARCH
Package xyz.yaszu.freedom.Subsystems

Class ProvinceManager

java.lang.Object
xyz.yaszu.freedom.Subsystems.ProvinceManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.bukkit.event.Listener
public class ProvinceManager extends Object implements org.bukkit.event.Listener
a system that allows for players to create provinces to prevent greifing. the system prevents other players from breaking or placing blocks as well as using explosions. this is done through a ritual.

      Parameters:
      owner - player claiming province
      rawCenter - center of province
      range - size of province
      structureBlocks - structure blocks
